name: AccountSummary.csv: emit cleaner derived JSON alongside the locale-formatted CSV
description: AccountSummary.csv values use Norwegian locale formatting ('617 196 NOK' with non-breaking space thousand separator, comma decimal where present, currency suffix). Every downstream consumer has to parse this. Emit a sibling JSON file with parsed numeric values so the brain doesn't re-implement locale parsing each cycle.
acceptanceCriteria:
- [ ] nordnet-holdings-extract post-step (or pricing.py derived-summary command) produces AccountSummary.json alongside the CSV
- [ ] JSON has per-account numeric fields: egenkapital_nok, markedsverdi_nok, kreditt_drawn_nok (positive number, sign of utilization captured separately), saldo_nok, tilgjengelig_nok, belaningsverdi_nok
- [ ] Locale parsing happens once at write-time; consumers read floats directly
- [ ] CSV retained for human readability + backward compatibility
